3306280.name: Vartra Abyss
3306280.description:
Vartra Abyss is an action role playing game set in an underground cavern that has been corrupted by an otherworldly power. You play as a spelunker who has been captured by a faction of Vartra, a race of blood fueled creatures with fantastical powers, and recently turned. You must learn to master your new abilities quickly to be able to survive in this dangerous landscape.

Navigate this world in search of your lost friend by fighting your way through countless enemies and unlocking new powerful abilities. 

Join The Mutated in their fight against The Abattoir, who rule this land with an iron fist and cause all but them to suffer. 

Play your way with flexibility to change your equipped abilities to suit your playstyle.
